title: rudgea pungens
intro: Rudgea pungens, also known as the 'Brazilian rosewood' or 'pungent rudgea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Rudgea pungens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also sometimes used in aromatherapy and as a natural insect repellent.
